children.text: security for a mortgage indebtedness to the United States Government; or

children.label: B
children.text: constructed under this subtitle or required by a contract under this subtitle to be operated on a certain essential foreign trade route; and
necessary in the interests of commerce and national defense to be maintained in condition for prompt use.
